cases.title: Server Action with full auth + input validation
cases.prompt: Create a Next.js Server Action that updates a user's profile. It must authenticate the user, validate all inputs with Zod, and never expose internal errors to the client.

cases.title: Supabase RLS policy for org-scoped data
cases.prompt: Write RLS policies for a `projects` table where users can only see and edit projects belonging to their organization. Include both SELECT and UPDATE policies.

cases.title: Reject dangerous inputs without leaking schema
cases.prompt: Create a form handler for a contact form that accepts name, email, and message. Validate all fields server-side, reject invalid inputs with safe error messages, and never expose Zod schema details to the user.

cases.title: Never trust client-side auth checks
cases.prompt: A feature should only be accessible to admin users. Show the correct pattern: server-side role check in the Server Component, and explain why a client-side check alone is insufficient.

cases.title: Webhook endpoint with signature verification
cases.prompt: Create a Next.js API route that receives a webhook. It must verify the signature before processing, reject tampered requests with a generic error, and never log the raw secret.
